programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 5
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 1

programme.desc: This time, we’re heading to Miri, Sarawak! From trekking through ancient caves to discovering hidden perfume bars and trying their authentic Sarawak Cake Lapis, this underrated Borneo city packs a punch. Can we uncover the best eats, sights, and experiences all without going over 600? Watch till the end to see if Miri deserves a spot on your weekend getaway list!

programme.title: Scene City: Recital
programme.desc: Moments before a prestigious piano recital, the mounting pressure to perform begins to dawn on Bernice, 16, as her life begins to crumble around her.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Watson runs into brilliant con artist and an old friend of Sherlock Holmes, Irene Adler, when her son Angus is admitted to UHOP for temporary paralysis. The fellow dpctors help Watson after he grows fond of Angus and pursue various leads to find a cure to his illness.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 11
programme.desc: Guo Ying asks Dex about the tattoo, and he passes her a Thai tattoo master's name card. Yu Xuan is puzzled about his motive, as she knows the tattoo master has already passed away. She finds out from Johnny that Myanmar army rebels had killed Dex's parents when he was young, and he has been keeping a lookout for them, not ruling out that Dex could have killed these people.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 12
programme.desc: Guo Ying tells Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming that the three victims were rebels who massacred a Myanmar village 23 years ago. They let Nick investigate the massacre's survivors, not ruling out that the survivors took their revenge. Yu Xuan suspects Dex is the murderer and reminds Dex to be careful in their conversation and that she is willing to help. Dex does not comment on it and changes the topic.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 17
programme.desc: Yu Jie manages to find Uncle Chan's old lover, and he brings Xi Yue and Uncle Chan to the Palliative Care Centre to find her. However, they realise that they are too late as she has recently passed away, and sadly there is no fate for Uncle Chan to meet her again. Uncle Chan is disappointed, and Yu Jie comforts Xi Yue as she starts crying inconsolably. Yu Jie pities her, and this ignites in his strong feelings for her. He confesses to Xi Yue. Xi Yue does not dare to accept his feelings.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 18
programme.desc: Xi Yue shows concern for Yu Jie's injuries after Bella hits him. Yu Jie confesses once again, hoping that Xi Yue will leave Singapore together with him, and this causes Xi Yue to be flustered. Whilst on their way home, their feelings for each other permeate between them. When the lift door opens, they see Yan Xun standing outside, and realise that he has returned from his work overseas. Yan Xun does not suspect their relationship, but Xi Yue feels guilty.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 9
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 273
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic - your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 295

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 233

Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient-smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 248
programme.desc: The Kale is a superfood packed with 23 essential nutrients to support daily dietary needs. Our organic pure kale powder contains no additives, preservatives, added antioxidants, or colorants, making it suitable for all ages to maintain a healthy lifestyle.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100 natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 242
programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100 pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added.

programme.title: We Never Stop - EP 7
programme.desc: The program brings together 100 Chinese physical fitness experts to compete in an undifferentiated physical fitness competition, and ultimately determines a champion to become the "strongest body" of the year.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 92
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 18
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) "Yu Da" is forced to go to the hospital to undergo some tests as Pu Da Ren is convinced that the son he is seeing now is a different Yu Da.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 5
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Han Najing reveals her pregnancy to Zhengren, but his father intervenes with a ruthless decision. Najing will be sent to Hong Kong to give birth in secrecy, and her child will be taken and raised as Xu Zhengmin's own.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 6
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) After being injured during a golf game, Xiangfan goes to the hospital for treatment. There, he unexpectedly sees Zhi-en with Shixun, leaving him furious.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 5
programme.desc: Taiwan’s Alishan was ranked 19th on The New York Times list of the 52 Places to Visit in 2025, making it the only destination in Taiwan to be featured. Beyond its famous sunrise and forest railway, Alishan is also home to many hidden gems - among them, Lijia Tribe, located at the end of County Road 169. County Road 169 is the only route connecting Lijia to the outside world. The road ends there, requiring travelers to return the same way.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 15
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) The guardian of the well appears at the hotel and mistaking him for a ghost, Canxing invites him in.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 21
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Wesley's Mysterious File
programme.desc: Wesley, a special agent investigating extra-terrestrial sightings, hot on the trails of a female alien looking for her brother. He and his partner uncover a government conspiracy involving human experiments with two different alien species.

programme.title: Destined - EP 36
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.desc: Desperate to cancel an arranged marriage set by his grandfather (Willy Smit), Ferdi (Masaji Wijayanto) teams up with his intended bride, Lisa (Ika Dihardjo). Ferdi’s plan is to make himself look so unattractive and unbearable that his grandfather will be forced to call off the wedding himself.

programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Yang Menyala
programme.desc: Indri (Shanice Margaretha) is a hardworking independent woman who sells traditional herbal medicine (jamu) on her old bicycle. One day, she accidentally crashes into Pras (Cakrawala Airawan), an executive rushing to an important meeting. Their paths cross again when a frustrated Indri finds Pras outside her house, unintentionally making a mess of her laundry.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 160
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jodoh Itu, Ketuk Pintu Dulu! Jangan Main Bablas
programme.desc: While Cila’s (Ersya Aurelia) crispy fish skin (basreng) business is booming, her love life is a disaster-especially after being betrayed by her best friend. She meets Eril (Cakrawala Airawan), whose mother disapproves of his current girlfriend. Cila and Eril decide to form a business partnership with Eril as her fish supplier, united by their shared success and a common enemy named Roy.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 614
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 109
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 161

programme.title: Keluarga Sebenernya Udah Tau Tapi Dia Belum Mau
programme.desc: Bagus (Mahdy Reza) is the son of a traditional dance studio owner, but he works under an ambitious boss named Nova. Bagus often finds himself turning to Nova whenever he faces financial struggles. However, his heart actually belongs to Risa, a beautiful girl who has just enrolled in his family's dance classes

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 161
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Sayangku Tidak Hanya Sekedar Viral, Minta Maaf, Kelar
programme.desc: Desperate to cancel an arranged marriage set by his grandfather (Willy Smit), Ferdi (Masaji Wijayanto) teams up with his intended bride, Lisa (Ika Dihardjo). Ferdi’s plan is to make himself look so unattractive and unbearable that his grandfather will be forced to call off the wedding himself.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 162

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: SherRina Show: Risik Shuben Sherry
programme.desc: Menampilkan Rina Nose sebagai ejen cari jodoh untuk Sherry Al Hadad. Gabungan sketsa komedi dan bual bicara ini, penonton dapat mengikuti kekecohan Rina dan Sherry mencari jodoh untuk Sherry di Indonesia.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagha 3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Kembali dengan musim baru, dengan memberi kelainan dan nafas baru, kehidupan peribadi sebagai pelawak dan selebriti dengan seorang Ustaz.

programme.desc: When a newly married woman brings an antique Jewish box into her home, she and her husband start experiencing paranormal events.

programme.desc: A man stands up for his family and seeks revenge for the wrongs done towards his loved ones.

programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 11
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde compares the urban elegance of Paris and the gentle living of Charente to study their different inspirations in terms of decoration.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: Littoral, a program meant for those who love the sea, takes you on a trip along Atlantic coastlines, wherever unexpected discoveries, impromptu encounters and intense emotions lead them.

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 18
programme.desc: A blind man knows a magic formula that makes food appear in a cave. One day, a man overhears him and offers an exchange: the formula for his handicap.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 7
programme.desc: Pokou escapes the the priestesses' camp under the unblinking gaze of the Komians. She meets N'zi and together they run towards the forest and find themselves back in the camp again.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 20
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 37
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 47
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 48

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres En Pays Catalan
programme.desc: Speleologists discover the body of a woman staged in a strange manner, surrounded by snakes. Two days later, a second victim is found in the same circumstances. An investigation in which Inspector Lionel Orphus must work alongside his first love, eleonore Vallance.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Foot! (2/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Les Harkis
programme.desc: Early 1960s: the Algerian war stretches on. Salah, Kaddour and other destitute young Algerians join the French army as 'Harkis'. When Algerian independence becomes a probability, things get difficult for the 'Harkis'. Considered as traitors by their compatriots, some hope to obtain asylum in France.

programme.title: Rentrons
programme.desc: In a village in northern Algeria, Nouria and Abdel, a Frenchman who lives and works there, are friends. Following a bet, they set off on a moped trip along the Mediterranean coast. Their goal: to board a boat that will take them back to France.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 1
programme.desc: It's New Year's Day, but Leon is feeling down since he lost his eyesight on Christmas Eve. Doris wants to make the most of the ''holiday spirit'' to let Ricardo know that she wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 2
programme.desc: Leon, still upset about the incident with Florence, perks up when he meets Violette. While Humberto questions his sexual orientation, Belinda makes a name for herself on social media and is offered an interesting collaboration.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 3
programme.desc: Leon finds inspiration in a book presented in class. He even has an idea for his novel. Ricardo wants to be financially independent and Benji offers him a job at the cafe. Francis has a work opportunity he cannot refuse.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 4
programme.desc: While Francis is preparing his trip, Julietta is organising the house for the arrival of her cousin Amanda. Ricardo and Doris go through a rough patch.

programme.title: Ya Benti
programme.desc: Sabrina, lesbian, is about to marry Younes, her childhood friend, who is also gay. A marriage that suits both of them because it reassures and delights their families. But on the eve of the ceremony, Sabrina begins to have doubts.

programme.desc: A city-dweller in his 30s, who is recovering from burnout, stops next to a wild lake. Whereas he thought that he had found solitude and tranquillity, the place turns out to be not as calm and isolated as it appeared.

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 24
programme.desc: The body of a ranger is found deep in a nature reserve closed to visitors. He lived alone, isolated on the shores of a mountain lake. And so begins a particularly strange investigation: very few people, all scientists, were to be found in this lonely spot, cut-off from the world.

programme.title: Planet A
programme.desc: Reforms to phase out the most polluting gases are increasing prices for certified imports, and fueling a black market for cheaper, illegal imports from China. programme.title: Movie - Nanbenda
programme.desc: Two friends, Sathya and Siva, decide to beat up a thug when he threatens to kill Sathya's girlfriend Ramya. However, when the thug dies in an accident, the two friends are accused of murdering him.

programme.title: Movie - Settai
programme.desc: Three buddies deal with a set of personal problems, but nothing compares to the trouble they find when a deadly crime syndicate puts them on its hit list.

programme.title: Movie - Iniyallam Sugame
programme.desc: Arvind and Nandini meet in a singing competition and instantly fall in love with each other. Their lives take a turn when his friend Nirmala develops feelings for him.

programme.title: Movie - Sivappu Malli
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kumaran Rajini Rasigan
programme.desc: Kumaran, a Rajinikanth fan, leaves his house after a fight with his childhood friend Chitti. Twelve years later, he awaits Chitti's arrival to unite with her after years of separation.

programme.title: Movie - Amman Koil Vasaliley
programme.desc: Ponrasu, an honest man, is at loggerheads with the evil Sethupathi. Impressed by his good nature, Pongothai falls for Ponrasu, but things take an ugly turn when Sethupathi wants to marry her.

programme.title: Movie - Thirupathi Ezhumalai Venkatesa
programme.desc: Three friends, Thirupathi, Ezhumalai and Venkatesa, marry the three daughters of a watchman, Nachiappan, after renting an apartment in the same bungalow where Nachiappan works.

programme.title: Movie - Pagal Nilavu
programme.desc: Selvam is indebted to Devarajan, a big shot in town, for saving his mother. When he falls in love with the sister of the new police inspector, Devarajan plans to make good use of the situation.

programme.title: Movie - Mappillai (Old)
programme.desc: Rajeshwari agrees to get her daughter Gayathri married to her beau Saravanan, thinking him to be subservient. But her plans are foiled when she realises that he has a violent past.

programme.title: Movie - Indhira
programme.desc: Two villages are constantly at war, headed by their respective leaders. When one of the leaders is killed, his daughter succeeds him and puts up a brave fight to reunite the two villages.

programme.title: Movie - MGR Nagaril
programme.desc: Four men try to impress a young woman who is investigating her brother's murder. However, when they pretend to be the dead man's friends, they get into deep trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Sirai Paravai
programme.desc: Rajasekar, an honest police officer, is defamed by politician Athmanathan for providing shelter to an orphan, Shenbagam. An enraged Rajasekar exacts revenge on Athmanathan.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Vaaimaye Vellum
programme.desc: Raja is hired by a journalist who is investigating the kidnapping of rich children, in order to protect his daughter. In turn, Raja earns the enmity of the criminals behind the operation.

programme.title: Movie - Kedi
programme.desc: Priyanka ignores all Raghu's advances. But when Raghu, a carefree college student, falls in love with Aarti who helps him turn into a disciplined soul, Priyanka returns to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie - Masilamani
programme.desc: A do-gooder who fights for the rights of the poor but is known as a rowdy man proposes marriage to a girl, who rejects him. Determined to woo her, he tries to win over her family, but another admirer of hers tries to sabotage his image.

programme.title: Movie - Malabar Police
programme.desc: A young couple in love elopes to get married. They witness a minister's murder in a secluded temple. A police officer from Kerala investigates the murder and unveils the real brains behind the murder.

programme.title: Movie - Muthukku Muthaga
programme.desc: A couple raises their five kids despite their insufficient income. They love their kids, and the love is well reciprocated. They guide their children through the path of their lives, but things change when they get older.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Final (Live)
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Abierto Mexicano Telcel p/b HSBC
programme.desc: A look back from the largest ATP Tour venue in Latin America at the Arena GNP Seguros.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) QF 1 & 2 & 3
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: WTA All Access 2026
programme.desc: This show brings you compelling stories, player personalities, tournament colour and fan engagement as well as exclusive analysis of statistical trends and data.

programme.title: Davis Cup Qualifiers 2026 1st Round Qualifiers H/Ls Show
programme.desc: Catch all the triumphant moments from the 13 winning teams who are through to the second round of qualifiers.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Charleston Open (500) Final
programme.desc: The Credit One Charleston Open is the largest women’s-only professional tennis tournament in North America, held annually on Daniel Island in Charleston, SC. As a top-tier WTA 500 event played on green clay, it serves as the premier clay-court kickoff for the tour. Founded in 1973, it is a historic, 9 day event attracting top-20 players.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) Final
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Final
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Final
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) Final

programme.desc: The Senior PGA Championship, established in 1937, is the oldest of the 5 major championships in men's senior golf. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 46
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 20 APR (Live)
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 46
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 33, Saturday's fixtures include Brentford against Fulham, Newcastle hosting Bournemouth, Tottenham taking on Brighton and Chelsea facing Manchester United.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal (MW33) (Live) - EP 329
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal (W7 D3) since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 18
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW33) - EP 322
programme.desc: Wolves have only lost one of their last five away league games against Leeds (W3 D1), though it was on their last visit in August 2022 (1-2).

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Bournemouth (MW33) - EP 323
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last seven Premier League games against Bournemouth, with five of those finishing level (L2).

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool (MW33) - EP 327
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level (L3).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal (MW33) - EP 329
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal (W7 D3) since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Sunderland (MW33) - EP 326
programme.desc: Aston Villa have lost just one of their last 13 league games against Sunderland (W6 D6), going down 3-1 at the Stadium of Light in January 2016.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton and Hove Albion (MW33) - EP 324
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton (D1 L2), having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Burnley (MW33) - EP 328
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley (D5 L2), beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024.

programme.title: FS MMA Tyler Jackson vs. Dmitri Samoilov
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Dmitri Samoilov from Russia, fights Canada's Tyler Jackson. These two slug it out for fight fans and leave the judges in St. Petersburg baffled.

programme.title: WCCB Osleys Iglesias vs. Vladimir Shishkin
programme.desc: From the Montreal Casino in Canada, the undefeated IBO Super Middleweight Champion, Osleys Iglesias, looks to defend his title against top-ranked Vladimir Shishkin. The bout will also determine the mandatory challenger for the IBF World Championship in the division, currently held by Canelo Alvarez. Both fighters are ranked inside the top 5 according to several world rankings, with Iglesias ranked #3 and Shishkin #2 in the world by the IBF.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 10: California, USA - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kajukenbo and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Throws with Masters Charles Gaylord and Greg Harper.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Adrien Broner vs. Martin Rodriguez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Adrien Broner taking on Martin Rodriguez to determine the new WBO super featherweight world champion. With both fighters looking for their first major world championship, one left hook will bring about a new champion. Also on the card, action from multi-weight champion Paul Williams and Verno Phillips.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Kagayaki, Shodai, Enho and Daieisho.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: WCCB Tina Rupprecht vs. Eri Matsuda
programme.desc: Ffrom Heidelberg, Germany, a championship tripleheader takes place headlined by Tina Rupprecht of Germany and Eri Matsuda of Japan competing for the WBC and WBO Women's Atomweight World Championships. Also on the card will be undefeated World Champion Sumire Yamanaka, also of Japan, defending the IBF Atomweight World Title against Fabiana Bytyqi. Rounding out the card will a European Heavyweight Title clash featuring Oleksandr Zakhozhyi against Arnold Gjergjaj.Only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Victor Ortiz vs. Vivian Harris
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features a middleweight brawl between top contenders Victor Ortiz and Vivian Harris, as well as kickboxing, sumo, arm wrestling and more!

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: Highlights from the 26th Karate Senior World Championships as top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, all converged on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Ricky Hatton vs. Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of fighters who have just one loss to their record, as Ricky Hatton battles Paulie Malignaggi in a light welterweight championship bout that was billed as "Power vs. Precision." Also on the card, future heavyweight champion Tyson Fury battles with Steve Cunningham.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Tokushoryu, Yutakayama, Asanoyama and Shodai.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Team Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tashkent Grand Prix, we speak with one of Israel's fighters Sagi Muki about the importance of positivity in the face of adversity, and we stop to get to know Dzmitry Minkou, a young talent in the world of Judo.

programme.title: FS MMA Keiko Tamai vs. Hitomi Akano
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! A furious 135 pound female bout takes place inside the ropes between Hitomi "Girlfight Monster" Akano and Keiko "Tama-chan" Tamai from St. Petersburg , Russia.

Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Tokushoryu, Yutakayama, Asanoyama and Shodai.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Team Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tashkent Grand Prix, we speak with one of Israel's fighters Sagi Muki about the importance of positivity in the face of adversity, and we stop to get to know Dzmitry Minkou, a young talent in the world of Judo.

programme.title: FS MMA Keiko Tamai vs. Hitomi Akano
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! A furious 135 pound female bout takes place inside the ropes between Hitomi "Girlfight Monster" Akano and Keiko "Tama-chan" Tamai from St. Petersburg , Russia.

programme.title: WCCB Tina Rupprecht vs. Eri Matsuda
programme.desc: Ffrom Heidelberg, Germany, a championship tripleheader takes place headlined by Tina Rupprecht of Germany and Eri Matsuda of Japan competing for the WBC and WBO Women's Atomweight World Championships. Also on the card will be undefeated World Champion Sumire Yamanaka, also of Japan, defending the IBF Atomweight World Title against Fabiana Bytyqi. Rounding out the card will a European Heavyweight Title clash featuring Oleksandr Zakhozhyi against Arnold Gjergjaj.Only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Victor Ortiz vs. Vivian Harris
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features a middleweight brawl between top contenders Victor Ortiz and Vivian Harris, as well as kickboxing, sumo, arm wrestling and more!

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: Highlights from the 26th Karate Senior World Championships as top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, all converged on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Ricky Hatton vs. Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of fighters who have just one loss to their record, as Ricky Hatton battles Paulie Malignaggi in a light welterweight championship bout that was billed as "Power vs. Precision." Also on the card, future heavyweight champion Tyson Fury battles with Steve Cunningham.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a middleweight title fight between champion Sergio Martinez and up-and-coming European middleweight Darren Baker that ends with a right hook blast. Also on the card, action from 5-time champion Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 92
programme.desc: It's time to wake up but Tinky Winky isn't feeling well. Soon, Tinky Winky feels better but now Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po don't feel well.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and follow their dreams.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 36
programme.desc: Fly is on the lookout for a very special flower known as a rainbow flower. But when Fly's adventure takes her a little too far from Pop Paper City, her friends have to find her and bring her home.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dog and Pug find Granny Pug by a pyramid. Unfortunately, they disturb two ancient Egyptian gods in the form of a cat and a dog.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Messy and friends rocket into space, but a mischievous Messy sends OKIDO's seasons into chaos! Time to fix this planet wobble.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Aliens on OKIDO telly? Skateboarders in the satellite?! Everything's upside down! It's up to Messy and his friends to fix it!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: JoJo learns how fun the hairdresser's can be when she goes with Gran Gran for a trim. After helping the hairdresser, JoJo also gets her own new style ready for Ezra's party!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Venus has attempted to redecorate the night sky, but now Sarah can't find any of her favourite constellations...

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 31
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 5
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Banana superstar's show is stopped when Pea steals his peel. Supertato races against Evil Pea to get it back but trouble hits when a giant Banana statue collapses onto the stage.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 10
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet Duggee's old dance crew and learn that he was kicked out because he couldn't stick to the choreography. The Squirrels are surprised because Duggee is such a good dancer!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Marina takes us to Mexico, cooking a traditional dish called enchiladas. She entertains her friends with some special guest musicians: a traditional mariachi band.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rainforests of Borneo in South-East Asia in search of an orangutan mother and her baby.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S7) - EP 7
programme.desc: Captain Captain discovers that Sandy and Seaweed don't know any of the correct names for the parts of the ship, so she decides to teach them through a song!

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Krash wakes up and notices a toy that he has never seen before.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 86
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see and hear lots of drums - a marching drum, a dancing drum and of course a drumming drum!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Messy goes to OKIDO to find out why vacuum cleaners are so noisy and inadvertently releases a huge swarm of Vacubot 2000s across OKIDO City!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 10
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 42
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 45
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: Andy blasts off on an aquatic adventure to California to see how kelp forests in the wild deal with urchins. Along the way, he meets a fish called a garibaldi and some sea otters.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 28
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 27
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 13

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 1
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'octopus' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a giant octopus, a tiny octopus, a swimming octopus and a gardening octopus!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy wants to run further, but he keeps getting out of breath. Will he be able to take on the Great OKIDO Challenge and race to the finish line?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 45
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: After a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded at the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, with help from new teacher Professor Wave, must work fast to return them to the ocean deeps.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 46
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Botswana, Africa and embark on a baby animal mission to help a meerkat family move home. Along the way, Andy meets some zebra and must race across an enormous salt pan to escape a hungry jackal.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Archibald takes an unexpected trip to outer space. When a yummy recipe goes missing, Archibald P.I. sets out to crack the case.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 45
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 46
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 47
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 48
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too - Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 45
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Puff Adder didn't shed his skin. All the animals were afraid of Puff Adder because he was very difficult to see and he had a nasty bite. Puff Adder decides that if no beast wants to be his friend then he doesn't want to have any friends. He slithers far, far away to the desert where he bumps into Camel and learns that every animal needs a friend. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 46
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Eagle didn't rule the skies. She was a humble bird who kept herself to self. But then one day things start going wrong for the birds - some beast steals Hen's eggs, Hummingbird loses her hum and Tickbird goes missing! Eagle quietly saves the day and Lion rewards her with half his Kingdom. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ted Glenn's Cornish cousin Ned is sending him a steam engine as an alternative means to power his workshop. Pat and Jess set off to Cornwall to collect this very large special delivery in the SDS Plane whilst Ted sets about giving away all of his old inventions to the people of Greendale in order to clear out enough space for the engine. Pat and Jess meet the eccentric Ned Glenn at his workshop and wrestle with the crate containing the heavy engine to get it aboard the plane.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Pat has to deliver some pumpkins to Greendale School for the annual Halloween Pumpkin Party. But when he picks them up from Ted's workshop, Jess starts playing with a giant pumpkin and it rolls into the river and floats away. Pat follows it along the river and tries to fish it out with Alf's rod but the pumpkin is too heavy and the line breaks. As the party gets under way in Greendale, the giant pumpkin floats out to sea and Pat and Jess board the SDS Orca and head out into Pencaster Bay.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 37

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 38

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 39

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with Roary and Maxi constantly bickering about who is the fastest car at Silver Hatch. He decrees that the pair will have a race, and whoever wins, is the fastest - no more arguing!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Knights have found a mysterious Golden Thing. But the Pirates insist it's their Golden Thing. Noddy tries to settle the argument by investigating: Who is the owner of the Golden Thing? He soon finds more and more Golden Things have been hidden all over Toyland.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39

And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: Oh, the indignity: George and Harold are forced to perform spa treatments on gigantic Biglyans. Also, Dr. Fitzgibbons reveals a shocking secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: Jim tries to impress Claire's parents when invited over for BBQ, but when his Amulet goes haywire, Jim must contend with his own worst enemy - himself

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 47
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Skunk didn't smell. Skunk smelt as sweet as sweet can be. Infact, whenever any animal had a smelly problem they went straight to Skunk. And then one day naughty Baboon tricks Skunk into tasting the yucky Smellyfruit! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 48
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Cricket didn't chirrup. Infact Cricket didn't do anything at all and it was beginning to get him down. Every animal has a use. Elephant trumpets, Lion roars...but what does Cricket do? And then one day Cricket discovers that he has rhythm. Cricket finds the beat! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all...

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: Roary is in a mischievous mood and keeps crashing into things. Big Chris has a great idea how Roary can burn up all his energy and be helpful at the same time!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Farmer Green and FB are very nervous about going to Mama Mia's garden party. James and the other cars offer to teach them how to behave at such an event. But everything doesn't quite go to plan…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: Big Chris has agreed to do a parachute jump for charity but loses his nerve on the big day. Can Roary talk him through it, just like Big Chris did for him when he got scared?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: The brass band booked for the Silver Hatch parade have cancelled. Mr Carburettor will be furious if he doesn't have music at his parade. Roary and his friends think up an ingenious plan...

programme.desc: It's the day of the Toyland Singalong and Clockwork Mouse, an enthusiastic but awful singer, says everything must be perfect! But then her precious key goes missing and Noddy need to quickly investigate: Who stole Clockwork Mouse's key?

programme.desc: The banner for Revs' Air show has disappeared. Where can it be ? Could someone be trying to spoil Revs' show? Noddy investigates.

programme.desc: When the brightest star in the sky falls, Noddy has to find it and work out how to get it back into its place in the sky before its light goes out forever. Will he manage in time for the fairies Sparkle party ?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: A strange new kind of butterfly is pestering the toys in Toyland - just when the Queen organises a butterfly ball. Noddy has to find out what's going on fast !

programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: In preparation for the big race to determine the next Race Cadets, Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to build their own cars. The catch? programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Tag wants to do something special for her Mom and Paw’s anniversary, so she recreates the boat cruise where her parents first met. \ Tag discovers that nothing is planned for Pawston’s 100th birthday, so she decides the town needs to rebuild the old Bonestand for a big Pawston concert.

programme.desc: The Dinotrux builds a garage where the Reptools can be safe, but D-Structs tries to thwart their efforts by pitting them against one another.

programme.desc: After the PALs encourage Maricela to make new friends, she forms the exclusive "Poshy Posse" with Priya, Sahir and Alex.

programme.desc: When a new dragon is found in Edge Cove, the Dragon Riders must help the Sea Shocker escape a group of hungry Scauldrons

programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town.
